'''Bar Oplut''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and a member of the [[Order of the Silver Jedi]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Bar Oplut [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to become a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] within the [[Order of the Silver Jedi]], a sect of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] who sought the complete and total annihilation of users of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. Following a complicated experiment went wrong, the famed Jedi Knight [[Force vampire|Tel Angor]] became a [[Force vampire|Force Vampire]], a terrible creature bent on draining the life out of its victims. In order to protect [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the Order dispatched a group of seven Jedi including Oplut to capture the vampire aboard an [[Outrider-class cruiser|''Outrider''-class cruiser]]. Containing the former Jedi aboard the ship, the seven Jedi were content with guarding their prisoner eternally aboard the ship.<ref name="P104" />

However, a miscalculation saw to the escape of the vampire, who killed off the Jedi guards one by one. The last survivor, Jedi Oplut, managed to destroy the ship's [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drives]] to keep the Vampire from escaping, and soon after died valiantly.<ref name="P104" />
